title: AIR Roots Index
description: Index of agent root configurations. A root is a self-contained agent workspace — a git repository (or subdirectory within one) that contains everything an agent needs to operate in a specific domain.

propertyNames.description: Root identifier key. Must be alphanumeric with hyphens or underscores.

Root.description: An agent root — a self-contained workspace for a specific domain.

name.description: Unique identifier for this root. Must match the key in the parent object.

description.description: What this agent root is for. Should be clear to anyone in the organization.

url.description: Git repository URL for this root.

default_branch.description: Default branch to use when cloning (defaults to 'main').

subdirectory.description: Path within the repository to the root directory (for monorepo setups).

default_mcp_servers.description: IDs of MCP servers to activate by default for sessions using this root.

default_skills.description: IDs of skills to make available by default for sessions using this root.

default_plugins.description: IDs of plugins to activate by default for sessions using this root.

default_hooks.description: IDs of hooks to activate by default for sessions using this root.

user_invocable.description: Whether this root can be directly invoked by users to start a session.

default_stop_condition.description: Default condition that signals the agent should hand back control (e.g., 'open-reviewed-green-pr').
